title: Bygone x Cobblemon
description: This Datapack adds Cobblemon spawns to the Bygone mod!
body:
Transform the mysterious Bygone dimension into a thriving prehistoric Pokemon ecosystem! This datapack brings 84+ Pokemon to life across ancient beaches, primordial oceans, ethereal fairy hollows, and amber deserts. Every biome features carefully curated Pokemon that belong in this lost world!

This pack was created for my up-coming Modpack "Cobblemon (RPG)"!

Features:

84+ Pokemon across 7 fully populated biomes
Legendary encounters - Kyogre in Primordial Ocean, Groudon in Amber Desert
Themed encounters - Pokemon match each biome's ancient atmosphere
Fossil Pokemon paradise - Amber Desert features dinosaur-like Pokemon
Fairy-tale aesthetic - Shelfhollow filled with Fairy and Psychic types
Evolution-appropriate spawns - Proper level caps for all Pokemon
Ultra-rare spawns - Including Spiritomb, Goodra, Aerodactyl, and more!
Biome Highlights:

Alphahang - Vibrant upside-down forest with Grass/Bug types
Underhang - Dark hanging forest with Ghost/Dark/Poison types
Shelfhollow - Pastel fairy dreamscape with Fairy/Psychic/Dragon types
Primordial Beach - Ancient shoreline with Fossil Pokemon
Primordial Ocean - Deep waters with ancient aquatic life
Megalith Field - Gloomy ruins with Rock/Ghost/Steel types
Amber Desert - Prehistoric wasteland with dinosaur Pokemon
Perfect for: Modpack creators, server owners, and players who want a fully-featured Pokemon experience in the Bygone dimension!

All the spawns:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Wzsp-Xm1r8938RjGw9WT55gkcqSfaR6CIXYxtbEmVP4/edit?usp=sharing

</details>
Installation:
Download the datapack
Place in world/datapacks or Open Loader/Other datapack loaders data folder
Run /reload
Start exploring!
Requires: Cobblemon 1.6.1+ and Bygone mod


Also check out:

Tropicraft x Cobblemon!
Eternal Starlight x Cobblemon!
